name: Solasto Corporation
summary: Solasto Corporation provides medical outsourcing services primarily to medical institutions in Japan. The company's medical outsourcing services include contracted services of medical clerical work. It also offers elderly care services, such as day service, home help, facility-based service, etc.; and childcare services, as well as engages in the education business. The company was formerly known as N.I.C Corporation. Solasto Corporation was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
